channel.title: Comments on: Big Sky Brewing: Trout Slayer – Ep. 66
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: dave@Classic
item.dc:creator: dave@Classic
item.description: moose drool is also big sky

item.title: By: andrewt248
item.dc:creator: andrewt248
item.description: Chris Lady with the save! There is a difference between filtered and unfiltered. Bell's doesn't filter any of there brews - they are cloudy and have yeast floaties in them... freakin' DELICIOUS!!! Moose Drool was in a can.
item.content:encoded: Chris Lady with the save! There is a difference between filtered and unfiltered. Bell’s doesn’t filter any of there brews – they are cloudy and have yeast floaties in them… freakin’ DELICIOUS!!! Moose Drool was in a can.
